name_en: New YSL|Shopping Bag|||Saint Laurent's classic Shopping Bag is here [Like]
name_cn:
New YSL|Shopping Bag|||Saint Laurent's classic Shopping Bag is here [Like]
Very soft cowhide material, wear and scratch resistant~ Lightweight and versatile~ For those needing a commuter bag, this is a great choice~[Chuckle]
Simple body with no obvious large logo, a small logo on the leather pull tab is very exquisite~ Comes with a zip pocket inside for storage [Like]
Fits a 13-inch laptop, though it is a fashion bag, occasional laptop use is fine [Cute (Plain) Size 47x31x11, Model 600281
